mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.user_no, u.nickname, u.username, u.mobile, u.head_img, u.sex, u.birthday, u.address, u.login_time, u.`status`, u.role, u.create_time, COALESCE(u.sync_quota_bytes, 5368709120) AS sync_quota_bytes FROM `user` u WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.del_flag = 0

SELECT u.id, u.user_no, u.nickname, u.username, u.mobile, u.head_img, u.sex, u.login_time, u.`status`, u.create_time, COALESCE(u.sync_quota_bytes, 5368709120) AS sync_quota_bytes, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CAST(f.size AS UNSIGNED)), 0) FROM file f WHERE f.create_by = u.id AND f.del_flag = 0 AND f.sync_directory_id IS NOT NULL) AS sync_used_bytes FROM `user` u
AND (u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') OR u.mobile LIKE CONCAT('%',#{param.keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%'))
AND u.del_flag = 0
ORDER BY u.id DESC
